name: Siouxland Bank
description_short: Siouxland Bank is a community bank headquartered in South Sioux City, Nebraska, offering checking, savings, lending, and online banking services with a focus on personalized customer service.
description_long:
Siouxland Bank is a regional community bank located in South Sioux City, Nebraska, serving customers in the Sioux region. The bank operates from its main location at 1001 W 29th Street and positions itself as a locally-focused financial institution emphasizing relationship-based banking and community connection, as evidenced by their "Siouxland Pride" branding.

The bank offers traditional banking services including checking accounts, savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), online banking, ATM access through the Shazam network, and various lending products with particular strength in mortgage and home lending. They provide loan calculators, financial planning resources, and online account access for customers banking remotely. The bank also offers mobile banking through apps available on both Apple and Google platforms.

Siouxland Bank distinguishes itself primarily through personal relationship banking, with multiple customer reviews specifically praising individual loan officers (Brett and Bart) by name for their expertise and service in home lending. The bank maintains a 4.8-star rating across 62+ customer reviews, with consistent praise for staff professionalism, responsiveness to account issues, and personalized service. Their approach emphasizes long-term financial relationships rather than transactional banking.

A notable limitation is their digital infrastructure, with at least one customer reporting being locked out of their online banking application with no after-hours support availability. This suggests potential gaps in their technology platform and customer support availability outside business hours. While the bank excels in relationship-based lending and personal service, prospective customers should verify current technology reliability and 24/7 support options before opening accounts. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Debit card services with 24/7 lost/stolen card support
pros: 4.8-star rating across 62+ reviews with consistent praise for staff professionalism
Personalized mortgage lending service with loan officers (Brett, Bart) specifically praised by name
FDIC insured deposits providing account protection up to regulatory limits
Online banking platform allowing account access from home or on the road
Statewide ATM access through Shazam Privilege ATM network
After-hours debit card support via Shazam (800-383-8000)
Long-term customer retention with multiple reviews from 10+ year customers
cons: Mobile app reliability issues with customers reporting being locked out of accounts
No after-hours support available to resolve digital banking problems when they occur
Limited geographic presence as a regional bank rather than nationwide availability
Website lacks detailed information about specific product offerings, rates, and fees

contact.address: 1001 W 29Th St, South Sioux City, NE 68776

best_for: Customers seeking personalized mortgage and home lending with relationship-based service
Midwest residents in the South Sioux City, Nebraska area preferring community banking
Individuals requiring reliable check/savings accounts with FDIC protection and local branch access
Borrowers who value face-to-face relationship banking over purely digital experiences
diagnosis: Siouxland Bank is best for customers in Nebraska seeking community-based banking with strong personalized mortgage lending and relationship-focused service. The main caveat is that their digital infrastructure has documented reliability issues with online account access and limited after-hours support, making them less suitable for customers who rely primarily on digital banking convenience and 24/7 technical support.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 1001 W 29Th St, South Sioux City, NE 68776
meta_description: Community bank headquartered in South Sioux City, Nebraska, offering checking, savings, lending, and online banking.
